title: Fix edhoc_kdf fn signature+CBOR info construction to match python _edhoc_kdf and RFC9528
description: Update rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:242 fn edhoc_kdf(prk: &[u8;32], th: &[u8;32], label: &str, context: &[u8], length: usize). Fix info = (label as tstr, context as bstr?, length as uint) order per spec. Remove undefined 'th' reference bug. Match Python exactly for interop.
